# HTML.Nofollow.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `HTML.Nofollow.txt` | 字数: 163

## 内容全文

HTML.Nofollow

TYPE: bool

VERSION: 4.3.0

DEFAULT: FALSE

--DESCRIPTION--

If enabled, nofollow rel attributes are added to all outgoing links.
